languages.text: {n}Своим молчанием Нунциус дает понять, что коммуникационная потребность в дальнейшей дискуссии окончательно закрыта.{/n}
{n}With his silence, Nuncius makes it clear that the communication need for further discussion has been decisively met.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Своим молчанием Нунциус дает понять, что коммуникационная потребность в дальнейшей дискуссии окончательно закрыта.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}With his silence, Nuncius makes it clear that the communication need for further discussion has been decisively met.{/n}

{n}With his silence, Nuncius makes it clear that the communication need for further discussion has been decisively met.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Con su silencio, Nuncius deja claro que la necesidad comunicativa de continuar con este tema ha vencido.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his silence, Nuncius makes it clear that the communication need for further discussion has been decisively met.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Con su silencio, Nuncius deja claro que la necesidad comunicativa de continuar con este tema ha vencido.{/n}

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯用他的沉默明确表示，进一步讨论的需求已经被彻底满足。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his silence, Nuncius makes it clear that the communication need for further discussion has been decisively met.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}努恩修斯用他的沉默明确表示，进一步讨论的需求已经被彻底满足。{/n}

languages.text: {n}De son silence, Nuncius laisse clairement entendre que le besoin de poursuivre cette conversation touche à sa fin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his silence, Nuncius makes it clear that the communication need for further discussion has been decisively met.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}De son silence, Nuncius laisse clairement entendre que le besoin de poursuivre cette conversation touche à sa fin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mit seinem Schweigen verdeutlicht Nuncius, dass der Kommunikationsbedarf für weitere Diskussionen hinreichend gedeckt ist.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his silence, Nuncius makes it clear that the communication need for further discussion has been decisively met.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit seinem Schweigen verdeutlicht Nuncius, dass der Kommunikationsbedarf für weitere Diskussionen hinreichend gedeckt ist.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヌンシウスは沈黙することで、さらなる話し合いの必要性が決定的に満たされたことを明らかにした。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With his silence, Nuncius makes it clear that the communication need for further discussion has been decisively met.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sessizliğini koruyan Nuncius, gerektiğinde tartışmak üzere iletişim ihtiyacının kesin olarak karşılandığını açıkça belli ediyor.{/n}
